features: Effective cleaning of household surfaces. Cuts through grease and grime. Non bleach. Plastic free wipes
Easy to use at home and on the go. Dimensions: 9,5 x 3 x 18 cm
Made from fibres from renewable and sustainable sources
Directions for use: Peel back seal, dispense wipes as required and reseal to prevent wipes drying out. Use wipe on surface and leave to dry for 60 seconds
Please dispose of used wipes with household waste. Do not flush down the toilet
description: Product Description Easy to use at home and on the go. Peel back seal, dispense wipes as required and reseal to prevent wipes drying out. Please dispose of used wipes with household waste. Do not flush down the toilet Ingredients <5% Non-ionic surfactants, Anionic surfactants. Disinfectant Didecyldimethylammonium Chloride 0.5g per 100g of liquid. Perfume. Product type 2. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if skin irritation occurs. Dispose of used wipes properly; do not flush. Use as directed, leaving the solution on surfaces for 60 seconds before wiping off. See more
